title: Bostik Max Repair Tape Clear - 50mm x 20m Roll - Ultra Strong Waterproof Duct Tape - Maximum Bond Strength - Heat Water & UV Resistant - Indoor & Outdoor Use
features: WATERPROOF - Can Be Used Idoor And Outdoors
TEMPERATURE RESISTANT - Able To Withstand Extreme Temperatures +60°C to -15°C
HIGH RESISTANCE TO VIBRATIONS - Ideal For Uses On Items Such As Line Stimmers And Powertools
FROST & TEMPERATURE RESISTANT - Max Tape Is Resistant To Variations In UV, Humidity, Frost and Temperature Variations Meaning Its Ideal For External Applications
description: Bostik Max Repair Tape is an exceptionally strong, versatile, waterproof repair tape, also referred to as a 'duct tape' or 'gaffer tape', for indoor and outdoor use. Available in three colours – black, grey, and clear – this extra strong tape offers high-performance for fixing and repairing any surface or material. Designed with maximum bond strength, this ultra strong duct tape delivers unmatched adhesion on a wide range of materials including wood, metal, stone, plastic, rubber, leather, and more, making it perfect for even the most demanding repairs. Formulated to minimise odour, the tape is perfect for indoor use without discomfort, whilst also being designed to endure harsh outdoor conditions. This exterior repair tape is resistant to UV rays, humidity, frost, and temperature fluctuations, ensuring that your repair withstands the test of time in any climate. Plus, it’s waterproof to provide a durable seal for leaks and cracks, making it ideal for emergency repairs. The clever formula of the no residue duct tape also makes it ideal for both temporary and permanent fixes. With our black and grey version of Max Repair Tape, these rolls are easily torn without the need for scissors, allowing for quick application. Our clear, waterproof duct tape requires cutting with scissors and offers a more discreet and seamless finish. Bostik Max Repair Tape is not just another duct tape - it's your comprehensive repair solution. Easily repair leaking hoses, seal cracked plastics, fix and reinforce stone, wood, or metal surfaces, hold items together, manage cables, or even use in craft projects!
